title: Hiring Software Engineer at Capital Float Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at Capital Float Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Capital Float Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Capital Float Ventures Solutions:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float Ventures Solutions!
